changelog: refactor(index.html, main.jsx): format meta tags for consistency and remove unused service worker registration
feat(tasks): enhance task fetching logic with user authentication and local storage fallback
Enhance TaskManager to support dynamic tag creation and updates; integrate TagInput for manual tag entry when no tag is selected
Implement offline session management for Pomodoro timer; add tag management features and refactor related components
Add confirmation modal for mode changes in Pomodoro timer
